productName: Dirty White Girls ( S ) Plaid Jacket BHO THCA Infused Joint - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Dirty White Girls and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
